name: Whole Wheat Batter Bread
recipeInstructions:
This recipe makes 2 loaves of bread. For one loaf, use 2 packages yeast instead of 3 and reduce all other ingredients by half. Omit wheat germ and soya flour if desired.
1. Preheat oven to the lowest heat setting.
2. In a very large bowl, dissolve yeast in ¾ cup very warm water. Stir in honey.
3. Coat loaf pans with margarine and flour.
4. Add oil, 2-½ cups warm water, and 2 tablespoons salt to the yeast mixture.
5. Gradually add about 4 cups of the flour mixture; beat at medium speed for 2 minutes.
6. Continue adding flour until the dough is sticky but not runny. If too loose, add more flour.
7. Transfer batter to prepared pans, smoothing the top and ensuring the dough reaches all corners.
8. Cover pans with a hot, damp towel and let rise in a warm place for about 20 minutes.
9. Check the bread after 20 minutes; it should have risen almost to the edge of the pan but not overflow.
10. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for about 40 minutes. Remove from the pans immediately and cool on a rack.
